title: Mace Hammers
description: Converts the Mace into a Hammer! Dynamically changes with enchantments, fully vanilla!
body:
# Mace Hammers
A simple pack to replace the Mace with a more impactful Hammer! Fully 3D modeled and vanilla using 1.12.5's item predicate system; absolutely no CIT required!

![Four hammers positioned in a spiral pattern on a dim gradient background.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/93e40f129da70db2f998c399645d66d0ad7ee889_0.webp)

_**WILL NOT WORK PRE-1.21.5!!**_ Enchantment components weren't a thing yet! Support _might_ be added using CIT, if I have the time.

---

Any issues? Message me on Discord: **@genericbadname**
